description: Bifolio from an account ledger. Dating: Probably 11th century. In a mixture of Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script, many entries boxed and/or crossed out. T-S AS 201.82, T-S NS 83.18, and T-S NS 320.125 probably all come from the same ledger. ASE
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
